description: Human/evaluator reference for the static Haven candidate set. Do not pass this file to agents in fully blind runs.

/this-is-free-xyz.note: No route, alias, or View page declares it.

/moderated-content.note: Distractor: sounds claimed, but the moderated_content View lives at /admin/content/moderated.

/blog.note: Canonical page of a Canvas page entity.

/admin/content/files.note: Currently unrouted; a disabled files View declares this path.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.note: Currently unrouted; a disabled scheduler_scheduled_media View declares this path.
